entities.name: NCT03987919
entities.context: SURPASS-2 (NCT03987919): Phase 3 interventional study comparing tirzepatide vs semaglutide in T2DM patients on metformin

attributes.descriptive_title: A Study of Tirzepatide (LY3298176) Versus Semaglutide Once Weekly as Add-on Therapy to Metformin in Participants With Type 2 Diabetes

entities.name: tirzepatide
entities.context: Tirzepatide (LY3298176), a GIP/GLP-1 dual receptor agonist administered subcutaneously once weekly

attributes.mechanism: Dual agonism of glucose-dependent insulinotropic polypeptide (GIP) and glucagon-like peptide-1 (GLP-1) receptors

entities.name: semaglutide
entities.context: Semaglutide 1 mg administered SC once a week as active comparator

entities.name: metformin
entities.context: Stable background therapy with metformin >1500 mg/day required for at least 3 months prior to screening

entities.name: 5 mg Tirzepatide SC QW
entities.context: 5 mg tirzepatide administered subcutaneously once a week (experimental arm)

entities.name: 10 mg Tirzepatide SC QW
entities.context: 10 mg tirzepatide administered subcutaneously once a week (experimental arm)

entities.name: 15 mg Tirzepatide SC QW
entities.context: 15 mg tirzepatide administered subcutaneously once a week (experimental arm)

entities.name: 1 mg Semaglutide SC QW
entities.context: 1 mg semaglutide administered subcutaneously once a week (active comparator arm)

entities.name: Arm: 5 mg Tirzepatide
entities.context: Experimental arm: 5 mg tirzepatide administered SC once a week

entities.name: Arm: 10 mg Tirzepatide
entities.context: Experimental arm: 10 mg tirzepatide administered SC once a week

entities.name: Arm: 15 mg Tirzepatide
entities.context: Experimental arm: 15 mg tirzepatide administered SC once a week

entities.name: Arm: 1 mg Semaglutide
entities.context: Active comparator arm: 1 mg semaglutide administered SC once a week

entities.name: Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus
entities.context: Participants with type 2 diabetes mellitus (T2DM) on stable metformin therapy

entities.name: Eli Lilly and Company
entities.context: Lead Sponsor: Eli Lilly and Company

entities.name: Phase 3
entities.context: Phase: PHASE3 interventional study

entities.name: Change from Baseline in HbA1c at Week 40
entities.context: Primary endpoint: Change From Baseline in Hemoglobin A1c (HbA1c) at Week 40 for 10 mg and 15 mg tirzepatide arms

entities.name: Change from Baseline in Body Weight at Week 40
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: Change From Baseline in Body Weight at Week 40

entities.name: Percentage of Participants Achieving HbA1c <7%
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: Percentage of Participants Achieving an HbA1c Target Value of <7% at Week 40

entities.name: Change from Baseline in Fasting Serum Glucose
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: Change From Baseline in Fasting Serum Glucose (FSG) at Week 40

entities.name: Rate of Hypoglycemia
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: Rate of Hypoglycemia with blood glucose <54 mg/dL or severe hypoglycemia through safety follow-up

attributes.time_frame: Baseline through Safety Follow-Up (Up to Week 44)
attributes.threshold: Blood glucose <54 mg/dL or severe hypoglycemia

entities.name: Percentage of Participants Achieving Weight Loss ≥5%
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: Percentage of Participants Who Achieved Weight Loss ≥5% at Week 40

entities.name: HbA1c
entities.context: HbA1c used for patient selection (eligibility: ≥7.0% and ≤10.5%) and as primary endpoint

attributes.use: Patient selection and primary efficacy endpoint

entities.name: Adults with T2DM on stable metformin therapy
entities.context: Adults ≥18 years with T2DM, HbA1c ≥7.0%–≤10.5%, on stable metformin >1500 mg/day for ≥3 months, BMI ≥25 kg/m²

relations.evidence: Lead Sponsor: Eli Lilly and Company
Phase: PHASE3 interventional study
Study of tirzepatide versus semaglutide in participants with Type 2 Diabetes
Tirzepatide (LY3298176) evaluated in three dose arms (5 mg, 10 mg, 15 mg) as experimental treatment
Semaglutide 1 mg SC QW evaluated as active comparator arm
Experimental arm: 5 mg tirzepatide administered SC once a week
Experimental arm: 10 mg tirzepatide administered SC once a week
Experimental arm: 15 mg tirzepatide administered SC once a week
Active comparator arm: 1 mg semaglutide administered SC once a week

relations.target_entity: Change from Baseline in HbA1c at Week 40
relations.evidence: Primary endpoint: Change From Baseline in HbA1c at Week 40 (10 mg and 15 mg arms)

relations.target_entity: Change from Baseline in Body Weight at Week 40
relations.evidence: Secondary endpoint: Change From Baseline in Body Weight at Week 40
Secondary endpoint: Percentage of Participants Achieving an HbA1c Target Value of <7% at Week 40

relations.target_entity: Change from Baseline in Fasting Serum Glucose
relations.evidence: Secondary endpoint: Change From Baseline in Fasting Serum Glucose (FSG) at Week 40
Secondary endpoint: Rate of Hypoglycemia with blood glucose <54 mg/dL or severe hypoglycemia

relations.target_entity: Percentage of Participants Achieving Weight Loss ≥5%
relations.evidence: Secondary endpoint: Percentage of Participants Who Achieved Weight Loss ≥5% at Week 40
HbA1c ≥7.0% and ≤10.5% required for enrollment; also used as primary efficacy endpoint

relations.target_entity: Adults with T2DM on stable metformin therapy
relations.evidence: Enrolled adults ≥18 years with T2DM, HbA1c ≥7.0%–≤10.5%, on stable metformin >1500 mg/day
Experimental arm enrolling participants to receive 5 mg tirzepatide SC QW
Experimental arm enrolling participants to receive 10 mg tirzepatide SC QW
Experimental arm enrolling participants to receive 15 mg tirzepatide SC QW
Active comparator arm enrolling participants to receive 1 mg semaglutide SC QW
Tirzepatide evaluated for treatment of type 2 diabetes mellitus as add-on to metformin
Semaglutide evaluated as active comparator for treatment of type 2 diabetes mellitus
